title: Lotus Megas [Cobblemon]
description: Lotus Megas is a collection of custom Mega Evolutions for our favorite Pokémon or ones we feel deserve more spotlight. Designs By Mijotto, Models By Vinip202
body:
## Lotus Megas Datapack

Lotus Megas is a collection of custom Mega Evolutions for our favorite Pokémon or ones we feel deserve more spotlight. Every design is driven purely by personal taste with references, expanded lore, and titles that (at least to us) sound incredibly cool.


<details>
<summary>Mega Pokemon List:</summary>

- Mega Jynx
- Mega Zoroark
- Mega Archeops
- Mega Flygon
- Mega Magmortar
- Mega Whimsicott
- Mega Typhlosion

</details>


<details>
<summary>Recipe</summary>

Archeonite: 1 Diamond+1 Smooth Rock+2 Sharp Beak+1 Mega Stone

![receita da mega](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77c5f9938c66ebcd234d7e0e029468a68edd389f.jpeg)

Flygonite: 1 Diamond+1 Dragon Fang+2 Red Sand+1 Mega Stone

![receita da mega](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c6ecbd443bdcb01cd2ce9075f2f98f5f7fb0fd1.jpeg)

Jynite: 1 Diamond+1 Icy Rock+2 Never Melt Ice+1 Mega Stone

![receita da mega](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88f1f61122383ccf81eb80437fd1ac71040c0672.jpeg)

Magmornite: 1 Diamond+1 Magmarizer+2 Magma Block+1 Mega Stone

![receita da mega](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ff6570132aebacfcf723a5b9260ec5262972145.jpeg)

Typhlosionite: 1 Diamond+1 Charcoal Stick+2 Soul Sand+1 Mega Stone

![receita da mega](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/242dadf8a22c518297396bcba5503ff134129976.jpeg)

Whimsinite: 1 Diamond+1 White Wool+2 Revival Herb+1 Mega Stone

![receita da mega](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f08d6a676ef40d0a62ffcb06e64e667e4da1d014.jpeg)

Zoroarnite: 1 Diamond+1 Toxic Orb+2 Colbur Berry+1 Mega Stone

![receita da mega](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c40a58e4f60ac6c1e5e3004d7821533dd79c563a.jpeg)

</details>


![Mega Typhlosion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71c9cfb1eb21f720f69a730851ac436ef2978302.png)


<details>
<summary>Credits:</summary>

**Character Design:** @mijotto Discord (Instagram: Renan_1702)

**3D Models:** @vinip202_16000 Discord

**Special thanks:** @urfav._jj Discord (Thanks for the Whimsicott model!)

</details>


_More contributors will be credited as the datapack grows with new ideas and designs_. Stay tuned — your favorite Pokémon might be next, and when it is, it's going to look amazing.
